APPEARANCES:
Timothy W. Moppin, Esq. of DUANE MORRIS 371-2260, for defendants ABE Technologies, Inc. and Allied Boston International, Inc., moving parties

Michael E. Gossler, Esq. of MONTGOMERY, PURDUE 206/682-7090, for plaintiffs and opposing party
* The Court heard related motions in 501817 and 501818
** A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT ABE TECHNOLOGIES, INC. A CALIF. CORP.'S Motion To Stay Enforcement Of Judgment Entered Pursuant To Sister State Money-Judgments Act -- GRANTED, PENDING OUTCOME OF APPEALS IN WASHINGTON RE: DEFAULT. The Court amended its tentative ruling: Defendant will not be required to post a bond. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855
